The SafePal difference, now available on your browse
We're proud to make wallets that are loved by millions for their supreme security and friendly design. Now we've combined these capabilities into a powerful extension wallet that lets you manage your holdings and navigate smart contracts from the comfort of your desktop.

Manage your tokens & NFTs in just a few clicks.
Swap & bridge assets across multiple chains.
